title: Custom Prenups, Liposuction and Luxury Vacations: What’s Inside “Everyone Wins” Nominee Gift Bags
summary: Not everyone is a loser on Oscar night as swag expert Lash Fary distributes curated bags to nominees featuring items like body-sculpting liposuction, cannabis, smile makeover packages and luxe vacations.

title: Oscar Photos: Executives (and Their Dates) on the Red Carpet
summary: Top film executives headed to the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood on Sunday night to celebrate the year's best movies and talent.
